title: dendranthema parthenium
intro: Dendranthema parthenium, also known as Feverfew, is a flowering perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Feverfew include reducing the frequency and severity of migraines, alleviating digestive issues, and lowering fever. Feverfew can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or dried infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
